name: Hermits (Cavaiani)
recipeIngredient: Dry sugar substitute equal to 1/4 cup sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine and brown sugar together at medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and mix at medium speed for 1 minute, scraping down the bowl before and after adding eggs.
3. Stir flour, baking powder, salt, dry sugar substitute (equal to 1/4 cup sugar), cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, walnuts, and raisins together to blend well.
4. Add the mixture along with water to the creamy mixture; mix at medium speed to blend well.
5. Drop dough by 1 1/2 tablespoons onto cookie sheets that have been sprayed with Pam spray or lined with aluminum foil.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cookies are browned on the bottom.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
